news.title:
Bharti Hexacom received a Rs 2.6L penalty notice from DoT for subscriber verification issues.
The penalty, identified in DoT's Dec 2025 audit, is under legal review by TDSAT.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom received a Rs 2.6L penalty notice from DoT for subscriber verification issues.
The penalty, identified in DoT's Dec 2025 audit, is under legal review by TDSAT.

news.title:
Jefferies rates Bharti Hexacom 'Buy' despite 16% CYTD stock drop due to tariff hike delays.
Revenue/EBITDA cut 7–11%; forecasts 15% hike FY26–28 with 60% upside vs 15% downside.
news.summary:
Jefferies rates Bharti Hexacom 'Buy' despite 16% CYTD stock drop due to tariff hike delays.
Revenue/EBITDA cut 7–11%; forecasts 15% hike FY26–28 with 60% upside vs 15% downside.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom executed a block trade of ~108,671 shares at Rs. 1625.3.
The total transaction value for the trade was Rs. 17.7 crores.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom executed a block trade of ~108,671 shares at Rs. 1625.3.
The total transaction value for the trade was Rs. 17.7 crores.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom's Q3 FY25 earnings call revealed consolidated revenue growth of 3.5% QoQ to Rs.54,000 crores, with EBITDAaL at Rs.27,700 crores and a margin of 51.3%.
India mobile segment grew 2.1% QoQ, adding 4.4M revenue-earning customers. Broadband saw strong momentum with 1.2M net additions, while 5G rollout covered 74% population.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom's Q3 FY25 earnings call revealed consolidated revenue growth of 3.5% QoQ to Rs.54,000 crores, with EBITDAaL at Rs.27,700 crores and a margin of 51.3%.
India mobile segment grew 2.1% QoQ, adding 4.4M revenue-earning customers. Broadband saw strong momentum with 1.2M net additions, while 5G rollout covered 74% population.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom Q3 revenue rose 4.8% YoY to Rs 2,360 cr; ARPU reached Rs 253.
Home services grew 50.8% YoY; EBITDA margin improved to 54.3%, net debt/EBITDA at 0.48x.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom Q3 revenue rose 4.8% YoY to Rs 2,360 cr; ARPU reached Rs 253.
Home services grew 50.8% YoY; EBITDA margin improved to 54.3%, net debt/EBITDA at 0.48x.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom Ltd schedules an earnings call on February 6, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY25 results.
The call will be held via Zoom, with a Q&A session starting at 3:30 PM IST post management briefing.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom Ltd schedules an earnings call on February 6, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY25 results.
The call will be held via Zoom, with a Q&A session starting at 3:30 PM IST post management briefing.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom announces board meeting on Feb 4-5, 2026, to review Q3 & nine-month audited results.
Trading window for Bharti Hexacom securities closed from Jan 1 to Feb 7, 2026, as per insider trading code.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom announces board meeting on Feb 4-5, 2026, to review Q3 & nine-month audited results.
Trading window for Bharti Hexacom securities closed from Jan 1 to Feb 7, 2026, as per insider trading code.

news.title:
JM Financial predicts 0.4-1% ARPU growth for telcos in Q3FY26, led by customer upgrades.
Reliance Jio and Bharti Airtel likely to see strong subscriber additions; Vodafone Idea may lose users.
news.summary:
JM Financial predicts 0.4-1% ARPU growth for telcos in Q3FY26, led by customer upgrades.
Reliance Jio and Bharti Airtel likely to see strong subscriber additions; Vodafone Idea may lose users.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom faces Rs. 2.92 lakh penalty for subscriber verification breach.
Penalty stems from DoT Q2 June 2025 audit; dispute ongoing in TDSAT court.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom faces Rs. 2.92 lakh penalty for subscriber verification breach.
Penalty stems from DoT Q2 June 2025 audit; dispute ongoing in TDSAT court.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom appoints a new CFO effective Jan 1, 2026, as outgoing CFO resigns due to internal transfer.
The new CFO brings 20 years of telecom finance experience, ensuring leadership continuity.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom appoints a new CFO effective Jan 1, 2026, as outgoing CFO resigns due to internal transfer.
The new CFO brings 20 years of telecom finance experience, ensuring leadership continuity.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom, Tube Investments, and Indian Bank are top midcap losers, down 3-4%.
GMR Airports rises 1% on major airspace expansion plans by 2029.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom, Tube Investments, and Indian Bank are top midcap losers, down 3-4%.
GMR Airports rises 1% on major airspace expansion plans by 2029.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom Q2 revenues reach Rs 52,000 Cr; India revenue Rs 34,900 Cr.
Focus on ESG with solarizing 35,000 sites, AI energy savings, and Nxtra-Google 1GW project.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom Q2 revenues reach Rs 52,000 Cr; India revenue Rs 34,900 Cr.
Focus on ESG with solarizing 35,000 sites, AI energy savings, and Nxtra-Google 1GW project.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom released Q2 FY25 earnings call audio-video recording on its website.
The recording pertains to audited financial results for the quarter ending Sept 30, 2025.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom released Q2 FY25 earnings call audio-video recording on its website.
The recording pertains to audited financial results for the quarter ending Sept 30, 2025.

news.title:
Bharti Hexacom Q2 net profit surged to 4.21B rupees from 2.53B YOY.
Q2 revenue rose to 23.17B rupees, EBITDA grew to 12B rupees, margin hit 52.1%.
news.summary:
Bharti Hexacom Q2 net profit surged to 4.21B rupees from 2.53B YOY.
Q2 revenue rose to 23.17B rupees, EBITDA grew to 12B rupees, margin hit 52.1%.
